meta.title: Playtime Manager — Gaming Venue Management System
meta.description: Manage your gaming stations, sessions, and revenue easily — works fully offline

hero.title: Playtime Manager
hero.subtitle: Professional management for gaming lounges
hero.description: Control your stations, track sessions, and monitor revenue — fully offline, no internet needed

problem.title: Your venue deserves better than pen & paper
problem.subtitle: Manual station tracking means lost revenue, calculation errors, and wasted time

items.title: Inaccurate manual timers
items.desc: A clock and pen can't auto-calculate time — errors mean lost money

items.title: No revenue visibility
items.desc: Without clear reports, you can't know today's or this week's earnings

items.title: Chaotic station management
items.desc: Tracking each station separately is exhausting and error-prone

features.title: Everything you need in one app
features.subtitle: Built specifically for gaming and entertainment venues

items.title: Station Management
items.desc: PlayStation, PC, Billiards, Ping Pong and more — add custom types and pricing per station

items.title: Open & Fixed Sessions
items.desc: Open session: auto-calculates price. Fixed session: notifies your phone when time is up

items.title: Revenue Reports
items.desc: Your venue's profit summary by day, week, month, and year — find your most profitable station

items.title: Works Fully Offline
items.desc: Local SQLite database on your device — no cloud, no internet, your data is always with you

items.title: Arabic + English
items.desc: Full interface in Arabic and English with complete RTL direction support

items.title: Security & Protection
items.desc: Owner PIN, clock tamper detection, and signed device-specific licensing

preview.title: Dashboard at a glance
preview.subtitle: See your stations, active sessions, and today's revenue — everything in one place

steps.title: Get your activation token
steps.desc: Contact your service provider to get an activation token tied to your device

steps.title: Activate the app
steps.desc: Enter the token in the activation screen — the process takes seconds

steps.title: Start managing
steps.desc: Add your stations, set pricing, and start tracking sessions immediately

reports.title: Your numbers always at hand
reports.subtitle: Detailed reports for every time period help you make smarter decisions

security.title: Your data is safe and protected

items.title: Owner PIN
items.desc: Protect sensitive settings and critical actions with a secret PIN

items.title: Clock Tamper Protection
items.desc: The app detects any unauthorized device clock changes and locks write actions

items.title: Signed Licensing
items.desc: Each device needs an encrypted license — your data belongs to you alone

items.title: Backup & Restore
items.desc: Create a backup of your data and restore it at any time

platforms.title: Available on all your devices
platforms.subtitle: A Flutter app that runs smoothly on desktop and mobile

items.name: Windows
items.desc: For desktop computers

items.name: Android
items.desc: For smartphones

items.name: macOS
items.desc: For Mac devices

items.name: Linux
items.desc: Linux systems

items.a: No, the app works completely offline. The database is local on your device and works anytime.
Contact your service provider — they will give you an activation token tied to your device. Enter it once and you're done.

items.q: How many stations can I add?
items.a: The number of stations depends on your license type. Contact your service provider to increase the limit.
Yes, Arabic is the default language with full RTL direction support. You can switch to English at any time.

items.q: What happens after the license expires?
items.a: The app switches to read-only mode — you can view data but cannot add new sessions until renewal.

comparison.title: Why Playtime beats traditional methods
comparison.subtitle: See for yourself — the difference is clear in daily venue management

pricing.title: Subscription Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your venue — full license per device

cta.note: Per-device license · Works offline · Full Arabic support

useCases.title: Built for every gaming venue type
useCases.subtitle: Whether your lounge is small or large — Playtime adapts to your needs
